title: The Monkey King: The Legend Begins
original_title: The Monkey King: The Legend Begins
overview: The Monkey King: The Legend Begins is the re-imagined version by Hollywood of the film The Monkey King: Havoc in Heavens Palace, the origin and birthplace of The Monkey King Story.
